blended.narrative: Ski Wentworth is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 224 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.6" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
